title: Carrying roll for roller hearth type heating furnace
abstract:
PURPOSE: To produce the title carrying roll which is highly resistant to compression and impact by installing reinforcing members under prescribed conditions between heat resistant seat materials which are blanked to doughnut-shaped disks at the time of inserting plural pieces of the heat resistant seat materials onto an iron arbor and subjecting the materials to compression molding.
CONSTITUTION: A fixing flange 2 is fixed to one end of the iron arbor (roll shaft 1) and a prescribed number of the heat resistant seat materials 4 of the doughnut-shaped disks (asbestos-substitute fibers and about 2W10mm thickness) and the reinforcing members 4 of the doughnut-shaped disks are alternately inserted onto the iron arbor and finally, the fixing flange 2 is provided to one end thereof. The reinforcing members 4 are constituted of metals, glass fibers, etc., and the thickness thereof is specified to about 0.02W0.5mm and the width of about ≥1/4 and ≤1/2 the width of the heat resistant seat materials 3. This laminate is then subjected to the compression molding so that the reinforcing members 4 are embedded into the heat resistant seat material 3. The carrying roll for the hearth roll type heating furnace having the greatly improved resistance to compression and impact is thereby obtd.
